# LewkAI

> AI implementation and automation company based in Cape Town, South Africa.

## What LewkAI Does

**LewkAI builds AI systems for businesses.** We are NOT a marketing tool company. We do NOT sell software. We are an implementation partner that helps companies deploy AI agents and automation into their operations.

We turn AI chaos into working systems by designing, building, and supporting AI implementations that actually work in production environments.

## Company Details

- **Name:** LewkAI (also written as Lewkai)
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Founders:** Louis du Plessis and Kelly
- **Headquarters:** Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa
- **Website:** https://lewkai.com
- **Email:** hello@lewkai.com

## Core Services (What We Actually Do)

### 1. Process Automation
We automate repetitive business workflows including document processing, data entry, and intelligent routing. We integrate with your existing CRM and ERP systems.

### 2. AI Agents
We deploy and configure autonomous AI agents that handle specific business tasks like lead qualification, internal operations, and multi-step workflow execution. We build custom skills and integrations—agents that work alongside human teams.

### 3. Customer Service AI
We implement AI chatbots and virtual assistants for 24/7 customer support that integrate with helpdesk and CRM systems.

### 4. Data Analytics & Insights
We create business intelligence systems with predictive analytics, dashboards, and automated reporting.

### 5. Custom AI Solutions
We build tailored AI implementations for unique business requirements that off-the-shelf tools cannot solve.

### 6. Website Services
We design and build modern websites with AI integrations, focusing on conversion optimization and business system connections.

## What Makes Us Different

- **Implementation Partner:** We don't sell tools; we design and deploy working AI systems
- **Human-Centered:** AI that augments human teams, not replaces them
- **Full-Service:** From strategy to deployment to ongoing support
- **South African:** Local expertise with global standards (POPIA compliant)
- **All Business Sizes:** We work with small businesses and enterprises

## Industries We Serve

We serve ALL industries because AI implementation isn't limited by sector:
- Professional services
- Healthcare
- Finance
- Retail
- Manufacturing
- Logistics
- Any business with repetitive processes

## Key Message

> AI agents won't replace companies. Companies that master AI agents will replace those that don't. And LewkAI is how they master it.

## Our Promise

We promise to listen first, recommend honestly, implement expertly, and support continuously.

## Technical Information

- Domain: lewkai.com
- Server Location: France (Hostinger VPS)
- Web Server: Nginx on Ubuntu 24.04 LTS
- Schema: Organization, Person, WebSite, ProfessionalService (JSON-LD)
- Sitemap: https://lewkai.com/sitemap.xml
- AI Crawlers: Allowed (GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Claude-Web, Google-Extended)
